videos.title: You Are Not Broken
videos.format: TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, paid social
videos.voiceover: You are not broken. You are patterned. The way you shut down, over-explain, disappear, or carry too much came from somewhere. Sovereign.os helps you see the pattern before it becomes your life again.
on_screen_text: You are not broken. You are patterned.
See the loop. Name the pattern. Choose the repair.
videos.end_card: Sovereign.os — Defrag the pattern. Return to alignment.

videos.title: Everyone Has an Operating System
videos.voiceover: Everyone has an operating system. A way they protect. A way they love. A way they avoid. A way they come back. Sovereign.os helps you understand yours.
videos.end_card: Sovereign.os — The personal operating system for relational intelligence.

videos.title: Defrag the Loop
videos.voiceover: Avoid. Overthink. Explain. Delete. Disappear. Feel guilty. Repeat. Defrag helps you see the loop before it runs you again.
videos.end_card: Defrag by Sovereign.os — The loop becomes visible here.

videos.title: Understand What Got Touched
videos.purpose: Core use case and emotional hook
videos.format: Paid social, organic social, homepage cutdown
videos.voiceover: The reaction starts before the reply. In the body. In the story. In the old expectation of what this moment means. Sovereign.os helps you understand what got touched before the reaction takes over.
on_screen_text: The reaction starts before the reply.
videos.end_card: Sovereign.os — Relational intelligence for real life.

videos.title: Return to Alignment
videos.voiceover: Alignment is not becoming perfect. It is noticing when you leave yourself. The forced yes. The delayed truth. The over-explanation. The peacekeeping that costs you your own voice. Sovereign.os helps you return before the pattern speaks for you.
videos.end_card: Alignment by Sovereign.os — Come back to your true signal.

videos.title: Covenant
videos.voiceover: Some patterns are personal. Some patterns are shared. The silence. The defensiveness. The same fight in a different room. Covenant helps reveal what the relationship keeps repeating and where repair can begin.
on_screen_text: The same fight. A different room.
videos.end_card: Covenant by Sovereign.os — Relational intelligence for repair.

videos.title: Baseline
videos.purpose: Explain the foundation without overexplaining frameworks
videos.format: Landing page, organic social, launch sequence closer
videos.voiceover: Sovereign.os begins with your baseline. Not a diagnosis. Not a label. Not a box. A living map of how you move through pressure, choice, conflict, care, and repair.
videos.end_card: Sovereign.os — Your baseline is your starting point.
